Name: Magistracy of Canopus
Description: The Magistracy of Canopus is a large Periphery state, located rimward and anti-spinward of Terra, just beyond the Free Worlds League. Founded explicitly as a matriarchy, the Magistracy is ruled by a Magestrix, a position open only to women, and usually held by a member of the founding Centrella family. Independent since the fall of the Star League, the Magistracy has remained mostly untouched by the Succession Wars, except by the overall collapse of trade and travel. The Magistracy is famed for its social and cultural freedom, with no consensual behavior forbidden by law or custom. The current ruler of the Magistracy is the Magestrix Kyalla Centrella, who harbors a deep grudge against the Inner Sphere, and the Free Worlds League in particular.
ReputationStatements: I am aware of your record. You are a disgrace and a scoundrel, mercenary. Apparently the Magistracy has seen fit to offer you this contract despite my protests. Perhaps my superiors are desperate.
Mercenaries are unpredictable. I am hiring you anyway, which says something about the situation. Don't make me regret this.
I generally prefer diplomatic solutions, but the Inner Sphere has made such things… unfashionable in this sector.
Greetings, Commander. The Magistracy of Canopus has a security task requiring contractors. We encourage professionalism, restraint, and results. In that order of priority.
The Magistracy values those who understand that strength is not always loud. This contract may interest you—it fits your skills and the tactics of your company.
Few mercenary commands manage to operate effectively in Canopian space without incident. Your team is the exception and currently my top performing asset.
Commander, always a pleasure. I have a premium contract requiring discretion and immediate resolution. Frankly, your team are the only ones in my portfolio I would entrust with this task.
MissionSuccessStatements: A clean and efficient resolution. Exactly what the Magistracy prefers.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: Not ideal, but the situation remains manageable thanks to your intervention. There's always next time, Commander.
BadFaithFailureStatements: The Magistracy does not reward contracts abandoned mid-execution. Future opportunities in Canopian space will reflect this performance.
